about.label: ABOUT
about.title: Built to fight misinformation
about.subtitle: TruthLens AI is an advanced forensic engine designed to analyze news veracity in real-time.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To empower citizens by instantly verifying digital claims through multi-layered artificial intelligence protocols.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: A future where algorithmic transparency builds a safer, deception-free digital internet ecosystem.

limitations.title: Current Limitations
limitations.item1: Cannot verify cryptographically secure closed systems (encrypted chats).
limitations.item2: Accuracy drops on heavily deep-faked audio without metadata.
limitations.item3: Struggles with extreme local dialects lacking training data.
